transcript.text: These numbers, real quick, slight drop in blog sessions, the cash flow statement indirect method blog was the one that saw a drop in clicks.
We're not seeing any position loss.
Something I do want to point out, just, you know, checking if you're seeing this internally as well, GSC is reporting like really high impressions for some reason.
So not sure if, you know, GSC is going crazy again, but yeah, I just want to flag that.
So the CTRs were dropping a lot, but we think it's more due to this abnormal increase in impressions.
So just wanted to flag that particular occurrence over here.
For the per diem pages and the expense category pages, we didn't see any significant changes.
You know, same observations as last week.
Generally, there are some new dot com pages showing up in the per diem searches and the expense category pages are pretty much holding steady at this new baseline level that we seem to establish.
For the tuning pages, slight drop in sessions again, but nothing major.
Every page in this batch lost a few clicks here and there.
So yeah, again, we saw a massive spike in GSE impressions, but nothing alarming in terms of positions, etc.
For the second batch of tuning pages, we're not quite sure how to say this, but GSE and GA4 don't agree with each other, despite the weekly sort of mismatch that sometimes happens.
We kind of drew conclusions by averaging both of them over the past couple of weeks.
Pages are performing reasonably well, and generally speaking, post-refresh performance is higher.
But yeah, and generally over the past two to three weeks, we have seen an increasing sort of traffic trend to these pages.
Regarding the treasury pages, again, it's pretty volatile given the low number of pages in this batch, the liquidity.
Positions report is pretty much what, you know, this entire cluster seems to hinge on, and that's what seems to be happening over here.
For the vendor pages, you know, there was a bit of a flatline in terms of the sessions itself, increased massively.

Generally, some things we're seeing is that the AI comparison pages are showing up quite a lot, especially the versus pages, you know, which is pretty significant given that we published those pages recently.
The content creation batch has not been super prolific in terms of a cluster or a cohort, but the cap-cut pages seem to be performing quite well.
So the cap-cut versus pages, and also I think the overview page was showing up in the top 10, I think.
So generally, that's the performance side of things.
The Luca reporting is going to change next week.
think we're going to move with.
I think
And what I'm hoping to do is like cohort the vendors a bit more based on the category so that we can dive deeper and also on the page type so that we can deeper into these.
But yeah, generally that's what we're looking at, the vendor pages for the refreshes.
Again, it's pretty much on the same level as last week.
Procurement challenges, that particular blog is the best performer.
So yeah, generally that's pretty much it.
Any questions or anything I can answer about any of this?
Okay.
Just an update on the vendor pages.
We're on track to publish all of them.
think based on Nita's last update, I think there's about four to five more pages that we need to get done by tomorrow.
End of day.
The rest of them.
The
I they've been staged in the CMS, or are being staged right now, and then we'll review them overnight, and then have them ready tomorrow.
And then, yeah, generally, as per his update here, the outlier spreadsheet is also completed, and EdPable is up-date.
And we're also on track for the two blog refresh articles for this week, so generally things are going pretty smooth.
Yeah, that's pretty much it.
Any other clarifications I can answer?
Not anything.
Okay.
Mara, was there something else you wanted to add?
I don't believe so.
I guess just an apology for being late.
It was hard to extricate from another meeting, but I'm glad Vivek could jump and join all of you.
Again, thank you for your patience, and sorry for the delay.
Oh, good.
Awesome.
All right.
That was it.
Thanks, everyone.
Nice to see all of you.
Bye, everyone.

default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly check-in to review content performance metrics and project progress for RAMP Holdings.](https://fathom.video/share/UZ2Nj_2bsxK2xP2y6zx-PAx7Y-zx4i91?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [📊 Slight dips in blog sessions; GSC reporting abnormally high impressions (potential glitch)](https://fathom.video/share/UZ2Nj_2bsxK2xP2y6zx-PAx7Y-zx4i91?tab=summary&timestamp=23.0)
  - [📈 Vendor pages showing promise, especially AI comparison/"versus" content](https://fathom.video/share/UZ2Nj_2bsxK2xP2y6zx-PAx7Y-zx4i91?tab=summary&timestamp=140.0)
  - [🚀 On track to publish all vendor pages by tomorrow, with 4-5 remaining](https://fathom.video/share/UZ2Nj_2bsxK2xP2y6zx-PAx7Y-zx4i91?tab=summary&timestamp=223.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance Overview

  - [Blog sessions: Minor drop, notably in cash flow statement indirect method blog](https://fathom.video/share/UZ2Nj_2bsxK2xP2y6zx-PAx7Y-zx4i91?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Per diem & expense category pages: Stable; new .com pages appearing in per diem searches](https://fathom.video/share/UZ2Nj_2bsxK2xP2y6zx-PAx7Y-zx4i91?tab=summary&timestamp=49.0)
  - [Tuning pages: Slight session drop; massive GSC impression spike (no position loss)](https://fathom.video/share/UZ2Nj_2bsxK2xP2y6zx-PAx7Y-zx4i91?tab=summary&timestamp=70.0)
  - [Treasury pages: Volatile due to small batch size; liquidity positions report is key driver](https://fathom.video/share/UZ2Nj_2bsxK2xP2y6zx-PAx7Y-zx4i91?tab=summary&timestamp=113.0)
  - [Vendor pages: Sessions flatlined but impressions increased significantly](https://fathom.video/share/UZ2Nj_2bsxK2xP2y6zx-PAx7Y-zx4i91?tab=summary&timestamp=129.0)
  - [Content creation batch: Cap-cut pages performing well, with overview page in top 10](https://fathom.video/share/UZ2Nj_2bsxK2xP2y6zx-PAx7Y-zx4i91?tab=summary&timestamp=154.0)

### GSC Anomalies

  - [Unusually high impression reports from Google Search Console](https://fathom.video/share/UZ2Nj_2bsxK2xP2y6zx-PAx7Y-zx4i91?tab=summary&timestamp=23.0)
  - [CTRs dropping, likely due to abnormal impression increase](https://fathom.video/share/UZ2Nj_2bsxK2xP2y6zx-PAx7Y-zx4i91?tab=summary&timestamp=30.0)
  - [Discrepancies between GSC and GA4 data for second batch of tuning pages](https://fathom.video/share/UZ2Nj_2bsxK2xP2y6zx-PAx7Y-zx4i91?tab=summary&timestamp=77.0)

### Vendor Page Progress

  - [4-5 pages left to complete by tomorrow EOD](https://fathom.video/share/UZ2Nj_2bsxK2xP2y6zx-PAx7Y-zx4i91?tab=summary&timestamp=226.0)
  - [Majority staged in CMS, pending review](https://fathom.video/share/UZ2Nj_2bsxK2xP2y6zx-PAx7Y-zx4i91?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Outlier spreadsheet completed](https://fathom.video/share/UZ2Nj_2bsxK2xP2y6zx-PAx7Y-zx4i91?tab=summary&timestamp=248.0)
  - [EdPable up-to-date](https://fathom.video/share/UZ2Nj_2bsxK2xP2y6zx-PAx7Y-zx4i91?tab=summary&timestamp=248.0)

### Upcoming Changes

  - [Luca reporting structure changing next week](https://fathom.video/share/UZ2Nj_2bsxK2xP2y6zx-PAx7Y-zx4i91?tab=summary&timestamp=176.0)
  - [Plans to cohort vendors by category and page type for deeper analysis](https://fathom.video/share/UZ2Nj_2bsxK2xP2y6zx-PAx7Y-zx4i91?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)

### Blog Refresh Status

  - [On track for two blog refresh articles this week](https://fathom.video/share/UZ2Nj_2bsxK2xP2y6zx-PAx7Y-zx4i91?tab=summary&timestamp=258.0)
  - [Procurement challenges blog performing best among refreshed content](https://fathom.video/share/UZ2Nj_2bsxK2xP2y6zx-PAx7Y-zx4i91?tab=summary&timestamp=202.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Complete and publish remaining 4-5 vendor pages by tomorrow EOD](https://fathom.video/share/UZ2Nj_2bsxK2xP2y6zx-PAx7Y-zx4i91?tab=summary&timestamp=226.0)
  - [Review and finalize staged vendor pages in CMS overnight](https://fathom.video/share/UZ2Nj_2bsxK2xP2y6zx-PAx7Y-zx4i91?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Implement new Luca reporting structure next week](https://fathom.video/share/UZ2Nj_2bsxK2xP2y6zx-PAx7Y-zx4i91?tab=summary&timestamp=176.0)
  - [Deliver two blog refresh articles as scheduled](https://fathom.video/share/UZ2Nj_2bsxK2xP2y6zx-PAx7Y-zx4i91?tab=summary&timestamp=258.0)
  - [Monitor GSC impression anomalies and cross-check with other data sources](https://fathom.video/share/UZ2Nj_2bsxK2xP2y6zx-PAx7Y-zx4i91?tab=summary&timestamp=23.0)

action_items.description: Complete remaining 4-5 vendor pages by EOD tomorrow
Ensure publication of all vendor pages
Review staged vendor pages in CMS overnight
